summary: The trader is leaning bullish after ES broke out of its week-long range. He expects a backtest of the 7458-7465 zone before resuming higher toward 7515, 7530, and 7555. He will wait for Failed Breakdown setups rather than chase. Line in the sand: 7458. Above it bulls are in control and targeting all-time highs; below it ES likely falls back into the prior week's range.
